item.title: He Put That Diesel Where It Shouldn't Go
item.description: A diesel swap with a surprising detail that ties the build together. The focus is on the part that makes the setup make sense and how it fits into the overall project. What do you think it is?

media:content.media:title: He Put That Diesel Where It Shouldn't Go
media:content.media:description: A diesel swap with a surprising detail that ties the build together. The focus is on the part that makes the setup make sense and how it fits into the overall project. What do you think it is?

item.title: Kenworth Start Test
item.description: A single turn decides whether this Kenworth catches or needs a deeper fix. A straightforward look at the start attempt and what the next repair step could involve. What happens next?

media:content.media:title: Kenworth Start Test
media:content.media:description: A single turn decides whether this Kenworth catches or needs a deeper fix. A straightforward look at the start attempt and what the next repair step could involve. What happens next?

item.title: Can We Make a Flamethrower Work?
item.description: A shop-life experiment to see whether a flamethrower can be made to work, with the result landing somewhere between a quick fix and a memorable failure. What happens next?

media:content.media:title: Can We Make a Flamethrower Work?
media:content.media:description: A shop-life experiment to see whether a flamethrower can be made to work, with the result landing somewhere between a quick fix and a memorable failure. What happens next?

item.title: This Diesel Setup Goes from Shaky to Proven
item.description: Watch the diesel build move from a shaky setup to full-on proof, with hands-on mechanical work and shop testing. What changed to make it work?

media:content.media:title: This Diesel Setup Goes from Shaky to Proven
media:content.media:description: Watch the diesel build move from a shaky setup to full-on proof, with hands-on mechanical work and shop testing. What changed to make it work?

item.title: The Expensive Lessons Behind Our K100
item.description: A few mistakes during the K100 build led to improvements we did not expect. This video follows the truck modification process and the lessons learned along the way. What changed in the end?

media:content.media:title: The Expensive Lessons Behind Our K100
media:content.media:description: A few mistakes during the K100 build led to improvements we did not expect. This video follows the truck modification process and the lessons learned along the way. What changed in the end?

item.title: One hidden fault decided its fate
item.description: A hidden fault changed the outcome for this diesel dozer restoration. The video follows the inspection and the mechanical work behind the decision. What would you check first?

media:content.media:title: One hidden fault decided its fate
media:content.media:description: A hidden fault changed the outcome for this diesel dozer restoration. The video follows the inspection and the mechanical work behind the decision. What would you check first?

item.title: F-Tree Kitty Build Update
item.description: The F-Tree Kitty project moves forward with the latest build updates, showcasing new progress, upgrades, and work on the CAT 3126-powered truck.

media:content.media:title: F-Tree Kitty Build Update
media:content.media:description: The F-Tree Kitty project moves forward with the latest build updates, showcasing new progress, upgrades, and work on the CAT 3126-powered truck.

item.title: Bronco Hidden Issue Changes the Repair
item.description: A hidden problem is uncovered during a Bronco repair, forcing a change in the repair plan and adding an unexpected twist to the restoration process.

media:content.media:title: Bronco Hidden Issue Changes the Repair
media:content.media:description: A hidden problem is uncovered during a Bronco repair, forcing a change in the repair plan and adding an unexpected twist to the restoration process.

item.title: K100 Restoration Bill and Truck Build
item.description: The total surprised even us, and the truck still had more to give. A look at the K100 restoration and the work behind the truck build. What would you tackle next?

media:content.media:title: K100 Restoration Bill and Truck Build
media:content.media:description: The total surprised even us, and the truck still had more to give. A look at the K100 restoration and the work behind the truck build. What would you tackle next?

item.title: Workshop Revival
item.description: A workshop restoration project brings worn equipment and machinery back into action through skilled repairs, practical upgrades, and hands-on craftsmanship

media:content.media:title: Workshop Revival
media:content.media:description: A workshop restoration project brings worn equipment and machinery back into action through skilled repairs, practical upgrades, and hands-on craftsmanship

item.title: Coyote 5.0 Weak Link
item.description: We caught it before the cheap mistake turned into an expensive day. A close look at the Coyote 5.0’s weak link and the garage tools used to catch it early. Have you seen this one before?

media:content.media:title: Coyote 5.0 Weak Link
media:content.media:description: We caught it before the cheap mistake turned into an expensive day. A close look at the Coyote 5.0’s weak link and the garage tools used to catch it early. Have you seen this one before?

item.title: #lowboy #restoration #trucklife Trailer Restoration
item.description: An old trailer gets put back to work through a practical restoration and rebuild. The video focuses on the process that made it useful again. What changed most?

media:content.media:title: #lowboy #restoration #trucklife Trailer Restoration
media:content.media:description: An old trailer gets put back to work through a practical restoration and rebuild. The video focuses on the process that made it useful again. What changed most?
